node_15.excerpt: Like unpacking assignments , tuple and list patterns have exactly the same meaning and actually match
node_15.fallbackText: Like unpacking assignments, tuple and list patterns have exactly the same meaning and actually match arbitrary sequences. An important exception is that they don’t match iterators or strings.
